long long solve(std::vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    if (n <= 1) {
        return 0;
    }

    // A_prev stores A[i-1], the required minimum value at the previous index.
    long long A_prev = nums[0];
    
    // d_prev stores d[i-1], the required total increase at the previous index.
    // d[0] = 0, since A[0] = nums[0].
    long long d_prev = 0;
    
    long long total_cost = 0;

    // Iterate from the second element (i=1)
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        // 1. Calculate A[i]: Minimum value such that A[i] >= nums[i] AND A[i] >= A[i-1]
        // A_curr = max(nums[i], A_prev)
        long long A_curr = std::max(nums[i], A_prev);
        
        // 2. Calculate d[i]: Required increase at index i
        long long d_curr = A_curr - nums[i];
        
        // 3. Calculate cost contribution: max(0, d_curr - d_prev)
        // If d_curr > d_prev, we need d_curr - d_prev new units of increase starting at i.
        if (d_curr > d_prev) {
            total_cost += (d_curr - d_prev);
        }
        
        // 4. Update previous values for the next iteration
        A_prev = A_curr;
        d_prev = d_curr;
    }

    return total_cost;
}
